mapper.select: SELECT mg.no, gm.group_title AS groupName, gm.start_date AS startDate, gm.last_date AS endDate, mg.status AS statues, gm.price AS amount FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.no = #{no} AND mg.status = '찜' ORDER BY gm.start_date

SELECT mg.no, gm.group_title AS groupName, gm.start_date AS startDate, gm.last_date AS endDate, mg.status AS status, gm.price AS amount FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.no = #{no} AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN gm.start_date AND gm.last_date ORDER BY gm.start_date

SELECT mg.no, gm.group_title AS groupName, gm.start_date AS startDate, gm.last_date AS endDate, mg.status AS status, gm.price AS amount FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.no = #{no} AND CURRENT_DATE > gm.last_date ORDER BY gm.start_date
